3328650.name: Elnea Kingdom - Early Summer Wa-Style Set
3328650.description:
A set of outfits and items themed after Japan’s traditional Children’s Day celebration. Available in shops at Yano Market and Castle St.

Includes new dessert recipes using matcha.

This DLC includes the following items:

・Outfits

Available at Matsuri Apparel on Castle St.

Orient Mail, Orient Mail: Elnea, Orient Mail: Red Crane, Indigo Ramie Jinbei, Black Ramie Jinbei

・Dyes

Available at Kagari Accouterments on Castle St.

Abyssal Green Hair Dye

・Japanese Sweets

Available at Wiala’s Tavern and Warm 'n' Toasty Grill in Yano Market.

Wa Bamboo Leaf Rice Cake, Wa Oak Leaf Rice Cake

・Matcha

Available at Caravan Co. in Old Town Riverside.

Two new dessert recipes using matcha will also be added to your kitchen.

※ This content can only be purchased once per account.

※ If you uninstall the DLC after saving, that save data will no longer be loadable.

※ The base game (sold separately) is required to use this content.

Please ensure your game is updated to the latest version if necessary.
